material_default: Bamboo cañahueca or PVC Sch40 1-inch nominal
notes: Toyo bass; traditional Andean ensemble anchor. Arka1 at 22.6-inch requires careful bamboo selection. See reference repo: transverse-flute for stopped-pipe packet baseline.

material_default: Bamboo cañahueca or PVC Sch40 3/4-inch nominal
notes: Zanka tenor; primary melodic voice in traditional ensemble.

material_default: Bamboo cañahueca or PVC Sch40 1/2-inch nominal
notes: Malta alto; same siku key G as Toyo but one octave higher. Octave Toyo/Malta pairing is standard in ensemble.

material_default: Bamboo cañahueca or thin-wall PVC 3/8-inch OD
notes: Chili soprano; Arka7 F#6 at 1.98-inch is at playability limit — prototype before committing. Traditional ensembles sometimes use only 11 tubes for soprano.
